entries.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1
entries.text_for_embedding: ## exploretock / Restaurant workflow 1 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: exploretock Domain: Travel Subdomain: Restaurant Goal pattern: Find available restaurants for a specific reservation type and location. Abstract action pattern: SELECT intent=Select the desired reservation type. target_type=select target=The dropdown menu for choosing the reservation type, such as 'Dine in', 'Pickup', or 'Delivery'. value_policy=Select the reservation type specified in the task goal (e.g., 'Pickup'). selection_rule= success= Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Clear the pre-filled location to enter a new one. target_type=button target=The clear button, often an 'X' icon, located inside or next to the location input field. value_policy=None selection_rule= success=

entries.name: exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2
entries.text_for_embedding: ## exploretock / Restaurant workflow 2 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: exploretock Domain: Travel Subdomain: Restaurant Goal pattern: Search for and filter experiences like dining, events, or winery tours based on specific criteria. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Initiate a search for experiences. target_type=button target=Search button located next to the location input field. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=Choose the button adjacent to the location input. success=The page loads search results. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Open the advanced filters panel. target_type=button target=Button to display more filtering options, often labeled 'Filters' or represented by a filter icon. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=Choose the button labeled 'Filters'. success=A panel with additional filter categories appears.

entries.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 3
entries.text_for_embedding: ## enterprise / Car rental workflow 3 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: enterprise Domain: Travel Subdomain: Car rental Goal pattern: Sign up for email offers with user details: {first_name}, {last_name}, {email}, {zip_code} Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Navigate to the email offers sign-up page. target_type=link target=Email Offers value_policy=N/A selection_rule=Choose the link associated with the text 'Email Offers'. success=A form for email sign-up with fields like 'First Name' and 'Last Name' becomes visible. Abstract action pattern: TYPE intent=Enter the user's first name. target_type=input target=First Name value_policy=Use the first name from the user details provided in the task goal. selection_rule=Select the text input field with an attribute like 'first-name'. success=The first name is correctly entered into the input field.

entries.name: enterprise / Car rental workflow 4
entries.text_for_embedding: ## enterprise / Car rental workflow 4 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: enterprise Domain: Travel Subdomain: Car rental Goal pattern: Find a specific car type at a given location for specified dates and renter age. Abstract action pattern: TYPE intent=Enter the desired pick-up and return location. target_type=input target=Search input for pick-up and return location, labeled 'Pick-up & Return Location (ZIP, City or Airport'. value_policy=Use the city or airport name from the user's request. selection_rule=N/A success=A dropdown list of location suggestions appears. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Select the correct location from the auto-suggested list. target_type=option target=The list item in the location suggestions that matches the intended city and state/country. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=Choose the option that contains the desired location text (e.g., 'Brooklyn, NY, US'). success=The location input field is populated with the selected location and the suggestion list disappears.

entries.name: kohls / Department workflow 5
entries.text_for_embedding: ## kohls / Department workflow 5 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: kohls Domain: Shopping Subdomain: Department Goal pattern: Navigate to a specific product department. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Open the main category navigation menu. target_type=link target=The main category navigation link, labeled 'Shop by Category'. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=N/A success=A menu displaying product categories becomes visible. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Select the target product department from the category list. target_type=link target=The link for the desired product department. value_policy=Infer the department from the product mentioned in the task goal. For 'dog collar', the department is 'Pet'. selection_rule=Choose the link whose text matches the inferred department name. success=The page loads the selected department's product listing.

entries.name: united / Airlines workflow 6
entries.text_for_embedding: ## united / Airlines workflow 6 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: united Domain: Travel Subdomain: Airlines Goal pattern: Enter the departure airport for a flight search. Abstract action pattern: TYPE intent=Enter the name of the departure city to trigger airport suggestions. target_type=combobox target=Input field for the departing city, labeled 'From*'. value_policy=Use the city name from the specified departure location. selection_rule= success=A dropdown list of matching airports appears. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Select the specific departure airport from the list of suggestions. target_type=button target=The airport suggestion button in the dropdown list. value_policy= selection_rule=Choose the button whose label contains the city, state, and airport code matching the specified departure location. success=The 'From' input field is populated with the selected airport.

entries.name: budget / Car rental workflow 7
entries.text_for_embedding: ## budget / Car rental workflow 7 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: budget Domain: Travel Subdomain: Car rental Goal pattern: Find a car rental location. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Navigate to the location finder section. target_type=button target=A primary navigation button labeled 'Locations'. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=N/A success=Sub-navigation options related to locations appear. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Initiate the location search. target_type=link target=A link labeled 'Find a Location'. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=N/A success=A page or form for searching for a location is displayed.

entries.name: underarmour / Fashion workflow 8
entries.text_for_embedding: ## underarmour / Fashion workflow 8 Source: Mind2Web exemplar Website: underarmour Domain: Shopping Subdomain: Fashion Goal pattern: Find a {gender} outlet {product_type} of {size} and add to cart. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Navigate to the outlet section of the website. target_type=menuitem target=The main navigation link for the 'Outlet' section. value_policy=N/A selection_rule=N/A success=The page displays outlet-specific categories or products. Abstract action pattern: CLICK intent=Filter outlet products by gender. target_type=link target=A link to refine results by gender. value_policy=Select the gender specified in the task goal (e.g., 'Mens'). selection_rule=Choose the link whose label matches the target gender. success=The product listing is updated to show items for the selected gender.
